channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: DJI Osmo 360 Review: The Best 360 Camera for the DJI-Pilled
item.description: Just make sure you have quality editing software that can handle 360 video.

item.title: Don’t Get Too Attached to Any AI App
item.description: Compute is a finite resource.

item.title: ‘Paradise’ Writer Teases What’s Coming in Season 3 After That Huge Twist
item.description: Executive producer and season 2 finale co-writer John Hoberg says the creative team already knows how the next season will end.

item.title: Paramount Plus is easily one of the premier streaming services right now — and you've only got one more day to take advantage of this excellent deal
item.description: From Yellowjackets to Yellowstone, and from South Park to Star Trek, Paramount Plus is one of the best streaming services going — and you've only got hours left to jump on this deal

item.title: BOXROOM lets you build a cozy game room for your Steam library
item.description: Your game collection says a lot about you. With a cute new game, you can also give your collection a space that's just as personalized. BOXROOM is a building sim where the whole purpose is creating a space to show off your game library. You can select furniture, paint and lighting, then you choose games from your Steam library to display on your virtual shelves. Titles appear in game boxes, giving it a throwback feel to the days where a game collection had to be physical. Once complete, the room serves as a launcher, allowing you to boot up a title from the game box. The demo is available now,...

item.title: Former Coatue partner raises huge $65M seed for enterprise AI agent startup
item.description: A few things turned investors' heads and drew them to participate in such a big round out of the gate.

item.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss
item.description: Your human manager may soon be a chatbot. Across organizations, AI is being used to replace layers of management in what some are calling "The Great Flattening."

item.title: 'The best of its kind': DapuStor’s 245.76TB PCIe Gen5 SSD is a speed monster you’ll likely never own
item.description: DapuStor’s 245TB SSD increases storage density and reduces infrastructure needs, though write efficiency and endurance trade-offs remain evident under scaling conditions.

item.title: Trump’s New White House App Is Mildly Concerning and Weird for a Lot of Reasons
item.description: The app tracks your location and also relies on a "random" guy's GitHub page, a blogger found.

item.title: Make your life easier and snag a self-emptying robot vacuum deal before Amazons Big Spring Sale ends
item.description: Yes, it's worth it to get a self-emptying robot vacuum. Shop budget options under $300 or grab a 2026 Roborock or Eufy release on sale.

item.title: Amazons Spring Sale is still live: We found 100+ deals on Apple, Kindle, Bose, and Ninja
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale runs until March 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and Kindles for $95.

item.title: This Frankenstein PlayStation PCB reads games from microSD and outputs video over HDMI
item.description: We're living in the golden age of retro console modding. If you have an old Game Boy Advance lying around, it's possible to give it a new lease on life with aftermarket parts like an IPS display and USB-C charging. But as amazing as those mods are, most still require an original GBA motherboard with a working processor and RAM. That's what makes the PlayStation Hybrid from YouTuber Secret Hobbyist so cool. Over the past couple of months, they've been working to design, prototype and build the ultimate PlayStation PCB, one that incorporates the best parts of different model revisions while addi...

item.title: Bloodsucking Ticks Can Survive Inside Your Home Longer Than You Might Think
item.description: The findings show why checking yourself for ticks is especially important, the researchers say.

item.title: Instagram | Des abonnements payants avec des fonctions supplémentaires mis à l’essai
item.description: Instagram a commencé à tester une nouvelle formule par abonnement payant dans plusieurs pays, avec des fonctionnalités supplémentaires surtout orientées sur les « stories », a indiqué lundi Meta à l’AFP, confirmant une information du site TechCrunch.

item.title: The Best New Toys of March 2026
item.description: Let's take a look back at the big toy news of the month, from Lego, to Hot Toys, and more.

item.title: Bad news, photographers: Sony has halted production of SD and CFexpress memory cards
item.description: In a fresh blow dealt by the memory crisis, Sony has pulled the plug on its SD and CFexpress card production for the foreseeable future.

item.title: Sora is gone — but these 3 AI video tools are already replacing it
item.description: Sora’s sudden disappearance has left a gap — but three alternative AI video tools already offer viable (and in some cases better) ways to create videos.

item.title: Judge Denies Liking LinkedIn Post Critical of Elon Musk But Reassigns His Cases Anyway
item.description: The judge said even the appearance of bias is bad for justice.

item.title: Deus Ex game studio Eidos Montreal cuts 124 jobs
item.description: Another day, another announcement of game industry job cuts. The latest restructuring is happening at Eidos Montreal, which stated that 124 people are being laid off. As with so many similar cuts, the studio's LinkedIn post credited the downsizing to "a result of changing project needs and impacts across production and support teams." The company is also parting ways with its studio head, David Anfossi. Eidos Montreal has worked on titles within the Deus Ex and Tomb Raider franchises, as well as Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy and Marvel's Avengers games. It is one of the many companies owned...

item.title: Our favorite DJI deals from the Amazon Spring Sale: Drones, mics, and power stations at record lows
item.description: We gathered the best DJI deals from the Amazon Spring Sale. Save $20 on the cult-favorite Mic Mini; take 29% off DJI Mini 3 drones.

item.title: Can the Decade - old NB - IoT "Cattle Networking" Regain Vitality with Heavy Investment ... - 36氪
item.description: ... sensor accuracy of the initial collars ... agricultural enterprises to carry out mortgage financing of agricultural facilities and livestock.

item.title: I test headphones and earbuds — heres what you should buy in Amazons Spring Sale
item.description: Save on over 35 top-tested headphones and earbuds from Bose, Apple, Sony, and more before the sale ends March 31.
